config.name: Student App Features Test (Already Logged In)

error.message: Assertion is false: "(Welcome|Dashboard|Quick Actions|My Profile|Out-pass|Leave|Attendance|Complaints|Tickets|Notices|Home)" is visible

attributes.text:
Unable to load script.

Make sure you're running Metro or that your bundle 'index.android.bundle' is packaged correctly for release.

The device must either be USB connected (with bundler set to "localhost:8081") or be on the same Wi-Fi network as your computer (with bundler set to your computer IP) to connect to Metro.

If you're using USB on a physical device, make sure you also run this command:
  adb reverse tcp:8081 tcp:8081

error.debugMessage:
Assertion '"(Welcome|Dashboard|Quick Actions|My Profile|Out-pass|Leave|Attendance|Complaints|Tickets|Notices|Home)" is visible' failed. Check the UI hierarchy in debug artifacts to verify the element state and properties.

Possible causes:
- Element selector may be incorrect - check if there are similar elements with slightly different names/properties.
- Element may be temporarily unavailable due to loading state
- This could be a real regression that needs to be addressed
